file_title: Eric Bellinger music videos with YouTube links — best-effort public-source JSON

included: Eric Bellinger primary/lead official music videos where a YouTube URL was found
official videos by other artists where Eric Bellinger is featured
official 360 VR experience videos as their own video_type
excluded_by_default: shorts, trailers, interviews, behind-the-scenes clips, tour recaps, and live fan uploads
duplicate uploads when a primary official URL could be identified

methodology: Searched public YouTube result pages and official Eric Bellinger/VEVO-style results for exact title matches.
Cross-checked selected entries against public music-video databases and music-news/video-premiere pages where available.
Marked entries as medium or low confidence when the URL or official status was not fully confirmed from the captured public result.
limitations: YouTube search results can change, videos can be deleted, made private, region-locked, or re-uploaded.
Some early mixtape-era videos and third-party features may be missing if not indexed clearly as official videos.
Director/producer credits are included only where a reliable public source was found quickly; most entries do not expose full video production credits in search snippets.
This is not a label-delivered videography export.
